shiftActivate.name: Shift Key Activate
shiftActivate.hint: When enabled, holding shift when clicking a scene link activates the scene.

ctrlJournal.name: Control Key Journal
ctrlJournal.hint: When enabled, holding control when clicking a scene link opens the journal.

playerView.name: Player View
playerView.hint: Allows players to view a scene by clicking a scene document link. Requires the scene to be available to all players in the navigation bar.

SCENE_LINK_VIEW.WARNING.noView: Scene Link View: You are not allowed to view the scene. Sorry :(
SCENE_LINK_VIEW.WARNING.noJournal: Scene Link View: There is no journal to show.
SCENE_LINK_VIEW.WARNING.compendium: Scene Link View: The linked scene is in a compendium.
